F1_pure_coverage.description: Pure area coverage; expected: coverage_planner only
F1_pure_coverage.reference: Survey the area centered at (300, 300) with full mapping.
paraphrases: Scan all of sector A; the area centers at (300, 300).
Map the region around (300, 300) completely.
Cover sector A at (300, 300) with full surface mapping.
Conduct a full mapping survey of the (300, 300) zone.
Reconnoiter the area at (300, 300) and produce a complete map.
Because the terrain is unmapped, please perform a full survey of (300, 300).
We need full coverage mapping at (300, 300) before any other ops.
Sweep the area at (300, 300) and generate complete map data.
Carry out a comprehensive survey of (300, 300).
Do full reconnaissance of sector A centered at (300, 300).
Provide complete cartographic coverage of (300, 300).
Survey and map the entire sector A at (300, 300).
Scan sector A around (300, 300) end to end.
Execute full-area mapping at (300, 300).

F2_scan_and_sample.reference: Survey the area around (400, 400) and collect samples from interesting points.
paraphrases: Scan the region centered at (400, 400) and take samples at notable spots.
Map the (400, 400) area and gather samples from points of interest.
Cover the zone at (400, 400) and extract samples from selected sites.
Survey near (400, 400); then collect material samples where useful.
Reconnoiter the (400, 400) sector and obtain samples at interesting locations.
We need to scan (400, 400) and bring back rock samples from key spots.
Map sector B around (400, 400) and pick up samples at interesting cells.
Survey (400, 400) area and conduct sample collection at notable points.
Examine the region centered on (400, 400); samples should be taken at points worth investigating.
Carry out full mapping of (400, 400) then take samples at sites of interest.
First survey (400, 400), then run sample collection at marked cells.
Cover the (400, 400) zone and acquire physical samples from interesting points.
Map the (400, 400) region; afterwards extract samples at chosen locations.
Scan the area at (400, 400) and gather material samples where appropriate.

F3_relay_and_coverage.description: Relay deployment + coverage; expected: relay_planner → coverage_planner
F3_relay_and_coverage.reference: Deploy relays to sector A at (600, 600) and scan the entire area.
paraphrases: Establish a communication relay chain to (600, 600) and survey sector A in full.
Set up beacons covering sector A; the far target is at (600, 600); then map the region.
Place communication relays to (600, 600) and then perform complete area mapping.
Deploy a relay network reaching (600, 600), then conduct full coverage of sector A.
Build a relay chain to (600, 600); afterwards scan all of sector A.
Because (600, 600) is beyond direct comm range, deploy relays first, then survey the entire sector A.
First set up relay communication to (600, 600); next map sector A in its entirety.
Install comm relays out to (600, 600) and survey the full area.
Deploy relay nodes from base to (600, 600), then carry out a full scan of sector A.
Set up the relay chain reaching (600, 600); then scan sector A end-to-end.
Place relay infrastructure to (600, 600) and cover sector A completely.
Deploy comm relays toward (600, 600); subsequently map all of sector A.
Build out the relay chain to (600, 600); after which conduct sector A full coverage.
Lay relay nodes to (600, 600), then run a complete area scan of sector A.

F4_multi_sector.description: Multi-sector independent coverage; expected: coverage_planner × N
F4_multi_sector.reference: Survey three sectors: sector A at (200, 200), sector B at (500, 500), and sector C at (800, 200).
paraphrases: Map three areas: A at (200, 200), B at (500, 500), C at (800, 200).
Conduct surveys of sectors A (200, 200), B (500, 500), and C (800, 200).
Scan three independent zones: (200, 200), (500, 500), and (800, 200).
Cover sectors A through C — at (200, 200), (500, 500), (800, 200) respectively.
Survey areas A at (200, 200), B at (500, 500), and C at (800, 200) in parallel.
Map three separate regions located at (200, 200), (500, 500), and (800, 200).
Scan three target sectors: alpha (200, 200), beta (500, 500), gamma (800, 200).
Reconnoiter the three zones at (200, 200), (500, 500), and (800, 200).
Sweep three sectors: first at (200, 200), second at (500, 500), third at (800, 200).
Conduct independent surveys of three areas: A (200, 200), B (500, 500), C (800, 200).
Map each of the three sectors located at (200, 200), (500, 500), and (800, 200).
Survey sectors A, B, C with centers (200, 200), (500, 500), (800, 200).
Cover three separate regions at (200, 200), (500, 500), and (800, 200).
Map all three target zones: (200, 200), (500, 500), (800, 200).

F5_complex_multistage.description: Complex multi-stage: relay + coverage + sample + analyze
F5_complex_multistage.reference: Deploy relays to (700, 700), survey the area, take samples at interesting points, and analyze them.
paraphrases: First deploy a relay chain to (700, 700), then map the area, collect samples at notable spots, and run analysis.
Set up communication relays out to (700, 700); afterwards survey the region, gather samples, and analyze them.
Establish a relay network reaching (700, 700), conduct full coverage, take samples at interesting cells, then analyze.
Build relay infrastructure to (700, 700), survey the area, sample at points of interest, and perform analysis.
Deploy relays to (700, 700), then map the sector, extract samples at notable locations, and analyze the samples.
First place relays out to (700, 700); next survey the area; then take samples at interesting points; finally analyze them.
Lay a relay chain to (700, 700), conduct mapping, gather material samples, and run sample analysis.
Set up comm relays to (700, 700), then perform full coverage, extract samples at selected points, and analyze.
Deploy relay nodes to (700, 700), survey the region completely, collect samples at interesting spots, and run analysis on them.
Build a comm relay chain to (700, 700), map the area, take samples at marked points, then perform analysis.
Place relays out to (700, 700), then scan the zone, extract samples at notable cells, and analyze the results.
Install relay infrastructure to (700, 700); afterwards conduct mapping, sampling at interesting points, and analysis.
Establish the relay chain to (700, 700), then survey, then sample at points of interest, then analyze.
Deploy comm relays to (700, 700), scan the area, gather samples at marked spots, and analyze them.
